comment: Regular tilings: 3 Euclidean 2D, iconic hyperbolic 2D samples on the Poincare disk, 1 Euclidean 3D honeycomb. Schlafli symbols and curvature classification per Coxeter (1973), Regular Polytopes, 3rd ed., chapters 4 and 5.

primitives.name: triangular tiling
primitives.notes: Six triangles meet at each vertex. Coxeter 1973 §4.5.

primitives.name: square tiling
primitives.notes: Self-dual. Four squares meet at each vertex. Coxeter 1973 §4.5.

primitives.name: hexagonal tiling
primitives.notes: Three hexagons meet at each vertex. Honeycomb pattern. Coxeter 1973 §4.5.

primitives.name: order-3 heptagonal tiling
primitives.notes: Hyperbolic regular tiling. (1/7 + 1/3 < 1/2). Rendered on Poincare disk. Coxeter 1973 ch. 5.

primitives.name: order-4 pentagonal tiling
primitives.notes: Hyperbolic regular tiling. Self-dual to {4,5}. Rendered on Poincare disk.

primitives.name: order-7 triangular tiling
primitives.notes: Hyperbolic regular tiling. Dual of {7,3}. Rendered on Poincare disk.

primitives.name: cubic honeycomb
primitives.notes: Only regular 3D Euclidean honeycomb. Self-dual. Coxeter 1973 §4.7.
